title: Unicode, Language, Tokenization, Fields, and Citation Offsets · Program Brief: Rag Stemming Stopword Boundary
summary: A search service lowercases and compatibility-normalizes every field, tokenizes all languages on spaces, removes legal negation as a stop word, and can no longer link a hit to its source span. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the stemming stopword boundary increment in reversible multilingual text pipeline. L…

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-stemming-stopword-boundary — Evaluate case folding, stemming, lemmatization, stop words, synonyms, and accent handling by language, domain, and changed query.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-normalization-tokenization-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-normalization-tokenization-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_normalization_tokenization_4(original: str = "Café API v2", normalized: str = "café api v2", language: str = "fr", field_count: int = 3, offsets_preserved: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if not original or not normalized:
        return False, 0, "empty-text"
    if not language or field_count < 1:
        return False, field_count, "language-fields"
    if not offsets_preserved:
        return False, len(normalized), "citation-offsets"
    tokens = tuple(part for part in normalized.split() if part)
    if not tokens:
        return False, 0, "tokenization"
    assert "v2" in tokens
    return True, len(tokens), "unicode-field-model"

# Evidence: rag-stemming-stopword-boundary-1xk098
# Competency: rag-stemming-stopword-boundary.
# Case 4774: a public-benefits policy change.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.

def evidence_rag_stemming_stopword_boundary_1xk098(original: str = "Café API v2", normalized: str = "café api v2", language: str = "fr", field_count: int = 3, offsets_preserved: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1xk098 = "1xk098-890kx1-4774"

        "corpus1xk098",
        "query890kx1",
        "tenant4774",
        "index1xk0984774",
        "prompt890kx14774",

    tokens = tuple(part for part in normalized.split() if part)
    if not tokens:
        return False, 0, "tokenization"
    assert "v2" in tokens
    return True, len(tokens), "unicode-field-model"
